game.exploding_game_started: {{count}} cards dealt. {{bombs}} pockets of firedamp are hidden in the gallery.
game.exploding_exploded: The firedamp blows! {{player}} is buried and out of the mine.
game.exploding_exploded_self: The firedamp blows and buries you! Out of the mine.
game.exploding_drew_bomb_defused: {{player}} strikes firedamp but cuts the fuse in time.
game.exploding_drew_bomb_defused_self: You strike firedamp but cut the fuse in time.
game.exploding_tucked_self: You tuck the firedamp back into the gallery, {{depth}} cards from the mouth.
game.exploding_skipped_self: You leave the shaft without digging.
game.exploding_attacked: {{player}} triggers a cave-in: the next miner digs extra.
game.exploding_attacked_self: You trigger a cave-in: the next miner digs extra.
game.exploding_saw_future: {{player}} sends the canary ahead and eyes the coming seams.
